outputSummary:
## bos/issue-10
1908764463438ee5658223e8be87e5c1237cfa7d
feat(delivery): promote draft PR before merge
Summary:
- add an exact-HEAD readiness gate to the post-approval lifecycle
- persist and validate idempotent readiness handoffs across restarts
- cover response loss, stale HEAD, closed PR, and provider failures

Rationale:
- approved draft pull requests must become ready before policy merge
- deterministic operation identity prevents duplicate provider mutations

Tests:
- cd elixir && mise exec -- mix test
- cd elixir && make all

Co-authored-by: Codex <codex@openai.com>
